title: The Origin
lines: You follow the trail of glowing green goo deeper into the subterranean maze. The rats scurry alongside you, almost escorting you.
The tunnel finally ends at a massive, rusted storm drain leading vertically upward.
The goo is thickest here, dripping from the rusty grate above.

options.desc: 1. Climb up through the storm drain grate
2. Reach out and touch the glowing green goo
3. Examine the source of the dripping liquid
